name: Spotter
ability: You start knowing who has the Lethargic's crab. [+the Lethargic]
firstNightReminder: Point to the player with the Has Crab reminder.

name: Thespian
ability: Each night, choose if evil abilities choose you instead until dusk.
firstNightReminder: The Thespian might choose to perform. :reminder: If so, wake the evil characters that choose players and ask them to choose as normal but target the Thespian instead.
otherNightReminder: The Thespian might choose to perform. :reminder: If so, wake the evil characters that choose players and ask them to choose as normal but target the Thespian instead.

name: Arctic Fox
ability: Each night, you gain the ability of an alive neighbor (you don't know which) until dusk.
flavor: Must your claws climb ten-thousand walls? You have come a very long way, sweet thing, but you do not belong here; you will not survive the week. I don't think they can climb ten-thousand more. (v1.2)
firstNightReminder: The Arctic Fox might change ability. If so, swap the Arctic Fox's character token to an alive neighbor's. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Arctic Fox might change ability. If so, swap the Arctic Fox's character token to an alive neighbor's. :reminder:

jinxes.reason: An Arctic Fox with the Spy ability doesn't see the grimoire.
An Arctic Fox with the Widow ability doesn't see the grimoire.

name: Skulker
ability: Each night, choose a player: until dusk, if you die & they are good, swap characters with them & they die instead.
flavor: You say you don't want me, but then you look for me. You push me under the belly, but then you wonder why I am quiet. You build walls around me, but then you ask "Can't you climb?" Then you call for me, and I am here. (v1.3)
firstNightReminder: The Skulker points to a player. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Skulker points to a player. :reminder:

name: Loose
ability: Each night*, choose to register as dead until dusk.
flavor: icon is a cut, loose, string (v1.1)
otherNightReminder: The Loose either nods or shakes their head. :reminder:

name: Speaker
ability: Each night*, choose a dead player: learn how they died.
flavor: make the icon something that brings to mind the book speaker for the dead (v1.1)
otherNightReminder: The Speaker points to a dead player. Show the player's death reminder.

name: Naturalist
ability: Each night*, if no-one died today, learn a player's character & how many steps they are from you.
otherNightReminder: If no one died today, show a player's character token & give a finger signal.

name: Taxidermist
ability: Once per game, at night*, choose a dead player: they are reincarnated as a Dummy.
otherNightReminder: The Taxidermist might choose a dead player. :reminder: :reminder:

name: Poet
ability: Once per game, during the day, publicly claim to be the Poet: the Demon is drunk until dawn.
flavor: a poet and you don't even know it! (v1.1)

name: Secretary
ability: If you died today or tonight, guess your alive neighbors' alignments: if correct, you live & are drunk.
otherNightReminder: The Secretary points to 2 players & gives 2 thumbs up or down.

name: Pitied
ability: If you are the last living good player, good wins.

name: Lethargic
ability: 1 good player has your crab. If you guess (once) who it is, you can no longer die. If just 3 players live, you lose this ability.
firstNightReminder: Wake the player with the Has Crab reminder. Show the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* token then the Lethargic token.

name: Desperate
ability: You are evil if at least one reminder token is on you. If not, you are good.
flavor: Please sir! Please! I ask for naught but a moment of your time! A moment for you to NOTICE ME. (v1.1) (Token & flavor by Diamondwar)

name: Imaginary Friend
ability: You don't register as a player.
flavor: Do you see it, above you? Reach for it; push your hand into the deep. Feel for it; it is wet and it cuts you and like silver it slivers. Grasp it, no matter how much it shimmers. Cut it like it cut you. (v1.1)

name: Bookkeeper
ability: You can't speak the group's primary language, or might be executed.

name: Identical Twin
ability: You register as an in-play Townsfolk character, even if dead. All players know you or them are this character.

name: Shef
ability: Each night, choose a player: the previously chosen player dies. If you are executed & more than 3 players live, the previously chosen player becomes an evil Shef. [No Minions]
flavor: DOWNLOAD NOW!!! AWESOME BLOOD ON THE CLOCKTOWER (FREE!) FREE --- CLICK HERE --- FREE DOWNLOAD NO VIRUS PLAY NOW!!! (v2.0)
otherNightReminder: The Shef chooses a player. :reminder: The previously chosen player dies. :reminder:

jinxes.reason: The Pit-Hag can't create a Shef.

name: Them
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. [Half of players are evil. Evil are in a line. No Minions]
flavor: They are the calm. They are the storm. They are the wire that binds us all. Their sweat gives us life. We breathe so They can bleed. Your skin peels and under that skin you'll find Them. (v1.0)

name: Quartation
ability: You think you are a good character, but you are not. Each night*, one of your alive neighbors might die. [Evil characters are Quartations]

name: Dummy
ability: When you learn a player died, you may choose to die instead.

name: Adultery
ability: If a 50% majority publicly accuses a player of adultery, they can't nominate nor vote.
